principle: Everything that contributes to scientific discovery is represented as a provenance-rich research object connected within a unified knowledge graph.

oci_records.title: Research Intelligence & Innovation Management
oci_records.description: Top-level Brain domain for managing scientific innovation, publication opportunities, grant relevance, evidence validation, and innovation provenance.

oci_records.title: Evidence Validation & AI Benchmarking Framework
oci_records.description: Framework for validating claims against curated evidence, benchmarking AI research tools, detecting hallucinated citations, measuring uncertainty calibration, and surfacing knowledge gaps.

oci_records.title: Innovation Provenance & Research Lifecycle
oci_records.description: Lifecycle record for every major innovation from inception through implementation, literature support, validation, publications, grants, and downstream derivatives.

oci_records.title: Publication Opportunities Register
oci_records.description: Persistent register of methods, datasets, analyses, frameworks, and other outputs that may be publishable.

oci_records.title: Conversation Innovation Auditor
oci_records.description: End-of-session audit process that checks for missed innovations, architectural decisions, literature needs, publication opportunities, grant relevance, and Brain updates.

oci_records.title: Innovation-as-First-Class Research Object Architecture
oci_records.description: Design principle that innovations, not only papers or code modules, are canonical research entities with provenance, relationships, evidence, and downstream impact.
